'''Rinto Liprus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] personal assistant of [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]].

==Biography==
He once met up with a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizer from whom he obtained some [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] political data. Baobab hired an intermediary to retrieve the data from Liprus near [[Moenia/Legends|Moenia]], though he claimed that he was merely sending for his assistant to fix his [[ear implant]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Rinto.jpg|250px|thumb|Randomly generated depiction of Rinto Liprus]]
Rinto Liprus appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
